stemHtml:
On a Lambert chart, a straight line is drawn between two waypoints, from VAXTI and RATSU. Using the following information, calculate the latitude of the parallel of origin of the chart.

Waypoint VAXTI: 58º12.0'N, 004º00.0'E
Waypoint RATSU: 63º30.0'N, 011º00.0'W
True track from VAXTI: 302º
True track at the mean longitude: 297º
